item.title: Quickstart (init -> build -> deploy -> verify)
item.intent: clawhq quickstart must take a user from zero to a running, reachable agent in one command. Any failure must leave clear guidance, not a half-deployed mess.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: The target user experience — one command to working agent. Phase-labeled spinners: Install -> Init -> Build -> Deploy -> Connect -> Verify. Missing dependency: also requires CQ-014 (install scaffold). Not ready until CQ-010+CQ-003+CQ-004+CQ-014 all land. Acceptance: 'clawhq quickstart --blueprint email-manager' produces a running, reachable agent with Telegram connected.
steps: Chain phases: install -> init -> build -> deploy -> connect -> verify
Add phase-labeled spinners showing progress for each step
Reuse existing command logic — no new implementation logic
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq quickstart --blueprint email-manager' produces a running, reachable agent
Phase-labeled spinners show progress for each step
Failure at any step leaves clear next-step guidance
Telegram connected and verified at completion
